sub_modules.dct1d_8_block_control: Combinational block completion and output index control.
sub_modules.dct1d_8_coeff_rom: Combinational fixed-point cosine coefficient ROM for DCT and transposed IDCT access.
sub_modules.dct1d_8_matrix_mac: Combinational 8-input matrix multiply and fixed-point Q14 scaling.
sub_modules.dct1d_8_round_scale: Combinational output scaling pass-through stage for pipeline composition.
